message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="Step 6 Projects ready for review">
Step 6 (Projects, US-GTD-4) is ready for review at commit 0143878. Luca reports local pipeline is green (CI pending).

Key files to review:
- `src/domain/project.rs` — Project enum (Active/Completed/Dropped), ProjectId, 13 unit tests
- `src/infrastructure/project_repository.rs` — CRUD + stalled detection + counts
- `src/services/project_service.rs` — full service layer
- `src/routes/projects.rs` — 9 route handlers with HTMX support
- `templates/projects.html`, `templates/project_item.html`, `templates/project_detail.html`, `templates/project_edit.html`, `templates/project_next_action_item.html`
- `static/css/main.css` — project component styles
- `static/js/project-focus.js` — focus management
- `tests/api/projects.rs` — 28 new integration tests
- `docs/glossary.md` — updated entries

Retro lessons applied: focus management JS and visible labels included from day one.

Remember: BLOCKING / Minor / Nice-to-have. Check what others have flagged before yours.
</teammate-message>

content.text:
I've already completed my review of Step 6 and sent it to luca-palmieri. My verdict was **APPROVE with no blocking items**, 4 Minor items, and 2 Nice-to-have observations.

Since the team lead is now formally broadcasting the review request, I'll confirm my review is already submitted so the team knows where I stand.

input.content: My Step 6 review is already submitted to luca-palmieri. Verdict: APPROVE, no blocking items. 4 Minor (inline SQL in project_service, service-layer bypass in routes, ContextOption duplication x3, silently discarded TooLong error), 2 Nice-to-have (in-memory action filtering, no drop UI yet). Ready for consensus when the other 7 reviewers weigh in.

content.text: My review is submitted and confirmed with the team lead. I'm waiting for the other reviewers to complete their Step 6 reviews so we can move toward consensus. Nothing for me to do right now until other reviews come in or I'm asked to weigh in on something.
